message:
refactor(cli): extend validate checks for new config paths, relocate upgrade tests

Add file-reference and binary-reference validation for send, prompts,
encryption, and new integration binary_path fields.  New unit tests cover
the added validation paths.

Move ~850 lines of upgrade-asset and CLI-plumbing tests out of the
monolithic cli_test.go into their proper homes, reducing file size and
improving test discoverability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
